DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar Jan-27-2026 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day, January 27, 2026 at 3:30 pm for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendants Kelly-Moore Paint Company, Inc. and K-M Industries Holding Co., Inc.

Dept. 304. Judge: Ethan P. Schulman. Clerk: Edward Santos, Reporter: NOT RECORDED (FTR). (304)

No Appearance by any party or counsel. Not contested.

After considering the written evidence presented and good cause appearing, the court adopts it's tentative ruling in favor of the Plaintiffs as follows:

The Application of Plaintiff Sala Sherwood, as Successor-in-Interest to and as Wrongful Death Heir of Thomas Sherwood. Deceased, for Entry of Default Against Defendants: (1) Kelly-Moore Paint Company, Inc., in the amount of $2,388,713.00; and (2) K-M Industries Holding Co., Inc., in the amount of $2,388,713.00 is GRANTED. The application as to Defendant A C P Inc. has been withdrawn.

The Court has reviewed the prove-up packet including the Judicial Council Form CIV-100, the memorandum, Mr. Nevin's declaration and the attached exhibits, which are admitted. The Court finds Defendants have been served with process, failed to answer or appear and defend the action within the time allowed by law, and default has been duly entered. As such, Plaintiff is entitled to the relief sought in the Application. The Court intends to execute the proposed judgment accompanying the application.
